title: Sweet German Pork Roast
description: A traditional German dish featuring a sweet and velvety pork roast, perfect for special occasions. This recipe is halal-friendly and uses only the finest ingredients.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together honey, apple cider vinegar, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and potatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the honey mixture.
Place the pork roast in a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot.
Add the honey-coated vegetables to the pot around the pork roast.
Cover the pot with a lid and transfer to the preheated oven.
Roast for 2 1/2 hours, or until the pork reaches an internal temperature of 145°F (63°C).
Remove the pot from the oven and brush the pork roast with the brown sugar.
Return the pot to the oven and roast for an additional 30 minutes, or until the sugar is caramelized.
Remove the pot from the oven and let the pork rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
